projectDescription: A NestJS GraphQL API backend powering PROJEIC, a project management platform for EIC (Engineering Integration Center) that supports both curricular and internal engineering projects.
keyFeatures: Google OAuth 2.0 authentication with JWT tokens
GraphQL API built with NestJS and Apollo Server
Project management with Kanban, Scrum, and Scrumban methodologies
Task tracking with subtasks, priorities, and assignments
Expected results tracking with evidence upload
AWS S3 file uploads with presigned URLs
Institutional project management tied to university subjects
publicApiSurface: Query: findAll(filter: ProjectsFilterInput) — List and filter projects
Query: myProjects(filter: ProjectsFilterInput) — List current user's projects
Query: findOne(id: String!) — Get a single project by ID
Query: tasksByProject(projectId: String!, sprintId: String) — List tasks in a project
Query: sprintsByProject(projectId: String!) — List sprints in a project
Query: boardsByProject(projectId: String!) — List boards in a project
Query: projectMetrics(projectId: String!) — Get project metrics and analytics
Query: sprintBurndown(sprintId: String!) — Get sprint burndown data
Query: me — Get authenticated user profile
Query: myNotifications(unreadOnly: Boolean) — Get user notifications
Query: activityLogsByProject(projectId: String!) — Get project activity logs
Query: subjects / subject(id: String!) — List or get academic subjects
Mutation: createProject(input: CreateProjectInput!) — Create a new project
Mutation: updateProject(input: UpdateProjectInput!) — Update project details
Mutation: archiveProject(id: ID!) — Soft-delete a project
Mutation: deleteProject(id: ID!) — Permanently delete a project
Mutation: createTask(createTaskInput: CreateTaskInput!) — Create a task
Mutation: updateTask(updateTaskInput: UpdateTaskInput!) — Update a task
Mutation: removeTask(id: String!) — Delete a task
Mutation: createSprint(input: CreateSprintInput!) — Create a sprint
Mutation: startSprint(id: String!, projectId: String!) — Start a sprint
Mutation: completeSprint(id: String!) — Complete a sprint
Mutation: createBoard(createBoardInput: CreateBoardInput!) — Create a board column
Mutation: addProjectMember(input: AddProjectMemberInput!) — Invite a member
Mutation: respondToInvitation(accept: Boolean!, projectId: ID!) — Accept/reject invitation
Mutation: createExpectedResult(input: CreateExpectedResultInput!) — Create expected result
Mutation: updateResultStatus(input: UpdateResultStatusInput!) — Update result status
Mutation: getUploadPresignedUrl(contentType: String!, fileName: String!) — Get S3 upload URL
Mutation: markNotificationAsRead(id: ID!) — Mark notification as read
GET /projeic/api/auth/google — Initiate Google OAuth flow
GET /projeic/api/auth/google/callback — OAuth callback endpoint
